title: Geronimo's Valentine
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: On Valentine's Day Geronimo's date goes hilariously wrong, then he and Hercule solve a cheesecake painting mystery! 💌

q.en: Who is the mouse Geronimo has a huge crush on and hopes to ask to be his valentine?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩深深暗恋、想邀请做他情人节对象的是哪只老鼠？

options.en: Petunia Pretty Paws, a TV reporter who saves the environment
options.zh: 佩图尼亚·美丽爪，一位致力于环保的电视记者
西奥·斯提尔顿，他的妹妹
萨莉·拉特穆森，报社对手

explain.en: Geronimo has a terrible crush on Petunia Pretty Paws, a TV reporter dedicated to saving the environment, and plans to ask her to be his valentine.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩痴迷地暗恋着佩图尼亚·美丽爪——一位致力于环保的电视记者，并打算在情人节邀请她做自己的对象。

q.en: What kind of mystery does Hercule Poirat phone Geronimo about on Valentine's morning?
q.zh: 情人节那天早晨，赫拉克·波拉特打电话给杰罗尼摩，是为了什么谜案？

options.zh: 奶酪蛋糕谜案（一幅名画被盗）

explain.en: Hercule calls saying he needs Geronimo's help to solve the 'CHEESECAKE MYSTERY', which turns out to be about a stolen museum painting.
explain.zh: 赫拉克打电话说自己需要杰罗尼摩帮忙侦破“奶酪蛋糕谜案”，后来发现其实与博物馆失窃的名画有关。

q.en: What special vehicle did Geronimo rent to impress Petunia for their date?
q.zh: 为了让佩图尼亚刮目相看，杰罗尼摩租了一辆什么特别的车？

options.zh: 一辆崭新的奶酪色敞篷车
一辆黄色的香蕉形汽车

explain.en: Besides renting a tuxedo, Geronimo also rented a fresh new cheese-colored convertible hoping Petunia would be impressed.
explain.zh: 除了租一套礼服，杰罗尼摩还租了一辆崭新的奶酪色敞篷车，指望能让佩图尼亚眼前一亮。

q.en: Whose prank dumped a load of mud on Geronimo from a passing dump truck?
q.zh: 是谁恶作剧，让一辆路过的翻斗卡车把烂泥泼了杰罗尼摩一身？

explain.en: A familiar face emerged from the dump truck — it was Hercule Poirat, who chuckled that he was 'so good at pulling pranks.'
explain.zh: 从翻斗卡车里探出一张熟悉的面孔——正是赫拉克·波拉特，他咯咯笑着说自己“最擅长搞恶作剧了”。

q.en: With the cabs and buses on strike, how did Geronimo finally get to Le Squeakery restaurant?
q.zh: 出租车和公交车都在罢工，杰罗尼摩最后是怎么赶到吱吱餐厅的？

options.en: He pedaled his nephew Benjamin's bicycle
options.zh: 他骑了侄子本杰明的自行车

options.en: He ran all the way there

explain.en: Remembering the transit strike, Geronimo spotted Benjamin's bicycle and jumped on it, pedaling furiously to Le Squeakery.
explain.zh: 想到交通罢工，杰罗尼摩看到本杰明的自行车，立刻跳上去拼命蹬着赶到了吱吱餐厅。

q.en: Which famous painting was stolen from the New Mouse City Mouseum of Art?
q.zh: 老鼠新城艺术博物馆里被盗的是哪幅名画？

options.zh: 一幅斯奎克斯·糖猪的肖像

options.en: A picture of a giant banana

explain.en: Kristina Colorsnout reports that someone stole The Celebration of Chocolate Cheesecake, a famous work by Pierre Passionpaw.
explain.zh: 克里斯蒂娜·卡勒斯诺特说，有人偷走了皮埃尔·帕西恩波的名作《巧克力奶酪蛋糕庆典》。

q.en: In the stolen painting, what is the founder of New Mouse City offering his new bride?
q.zh: 在那幅失窃的画里，老鼠新城的创始人正递给新娘什么？

options.en: A sample of a brand-new dessert: chocolate cheesecake
options.zh: 一份全新甜点：巧克力奶酪蛋糕

explain.en: The painting shows founder Grant Gentlemouse offering his bride Glitterfur a sample of a brand-new dessert: chocolate cheesecake.
explain.zh: 画中描绘创始人格兰特·绅士鼠正把一份全新甜点——巧克力奶酪蛋糕——递给新娘亮毛鼠。

q.en: What password opened the museum's secret back door to let Geronimo and Hercule inside?
q.zh: 打开博物馆秘密后门、让杰罗尼摩和赫拉克进去的暗语是什么？

explain.en: When a voice asked for the password, Hercule whispered, 'Chocolate Cheesy Chews,' and the back door popped open.
explain.zh: 当门后传来“暗语？”的询问时，赫拉克低声说了句“巧克力奶酪糖”，后门便弹开了。

q.en: Who was really behind the theft of the painting and the mousenapping of Perky Le Mouse?
q.zh: 名画失窃以及佩基·鼠小姐被绑架，真正的幕后主使是谁？

options.en: Squeaks Sugarhog, the rich cheesecake factory owner
options.zh: 斯奎克斯·糖猪，富有的奶酪蛋糕工厂老板
助理馆长克里斯蒂娜·卡勒斯诺特
杰罗尼摩的侄子本杰明

explain.en: Inside the factory's secret room, the butler admits he 'stole that painting for you,' and Squeaks Sugarhog is the mysterious, extremely rich owner who ordered it.
explain.zh: 在工厂的密室里，管家承认“我是为你偷了那幅画”，而斯奎克斯·糖猪就是那个下令、神秘又极其富有的工厂老板。

q.en: What secret did restorer Perky Le Mouse discover hidden under layers of paint on a rock in the corner of the painting?
q.zh: 修复师佩基·鼠小姐在画角石头上的层层颜料底下，发现了什么秘密？

options.en: A recipe for the perfect chocolate cheesecake
options.zh: 一份完美巧克力奶酪蛋糕的配方

options.en: A love letter from the artist
A tiny portrait of a mouse
options.zh: 一只小老鼠的微型画像

explain.en: Dipping a rag in turpentine, Perky removed the top paint layer and found the artist had written a recipe for the perfect chocolate cheesecake.
explain.zh: 佩基把布浸进松节油，擦去表层颜料，发现画家当年在画上写下了一份完美巧克力奶酪蛋糕的配方。
